content.cn_text: 第四部分。
content.en_text: Part 4.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一段关于一种名为非洲爪蟾的动物的生物学讲座节选。
content.en_text: You will hear part of a biology lecture about an animal called the African Claude frog.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有时间查看问题31至40。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 31 to 40.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听并回答问题31至40。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 31 to 40.

content.cn_text: 今天，我想介绍另一种两栖动物，非洲爪蟾，其拉丁名为Xenopus Levis。
content.en_text: Today, I'd like to look at another type of amphibian, the African Claude frog, whose Latin name is Xenopus Levis.

content.cn_text: 它的名字来源于每只后脚上的三只短爪，它用这些爪子撕开食物。
content.en_text: Its name is derived from the three short claws on each hind foot, which it uses to tear apart its food.

content.cn_text: 拉丁词Xenopus意为“奇异的脚”，Levis意为“光滑的”。
content.en_text: The Latin word Xenopus means strange foot and Levis means smooth.

content.cn_text: 我将从一般描述开始。非洲爪蟾是一种常见的青蛙，主要分布在非洲的东部和南部地区。
content.en_text: I'll start with a general description. The African Claude frog is a species of frog that can be commonly found in the eastern and southern parts of Africa.

content.cn_text: 它们的头部和身体扁平，但没有舌头或外耳。
content.en_text: They have a flattened head and body, but no tongue or external ears.

content.cn_text: 正如其拉丁名称所示，非洲爪蟾的皮肤光滑，这与皮肤总是粗糙的蟾蜍不同。
content.en_text: As the Latin name suggests, African Claude frogs have smooth skin, unlike the toad, whose skin always has a rough texture.

content.cn_text: 非洲爪蟾的身体覆盖着黏液，这可以为它们敏感的皮肤提供保护，从而在其生存中发挥不可或缺的作用。
content.en_text: The body of African Claude frogs is covered with mucus, which can give their sensitive skin protection, thus playing an indispensable role in their survival.

content.cn_text: 雄性和雌性非洲爪蟾可以通过几个特征轻松区分，其中主要的一个是它们的体型。
content.en_text: Male and female African Claude frogs can be easily distinguished through several characteristics, and the major one is their size.

content.cn_text: 一般来说，雄性青蛙的体型大约是雌性的一半。具体来说，雌性青蛙通常长4.5英寸，重约7盎司，而雄性通常长2.5英寸，重2盎司。
content.en_text: Generally, male frogs are about half as big as females. Specifically, female frogs are usually 4.5 inches long, weighing around 7 ounces, while males are generally 2.5 inches long and 2 ounces heavy.

content.cn_text: 接下来，我们来看看它们的栖息地。非洲爪蟾是完全水生的青蛙，所以它们一生都生活在水中，无论是蝌蚪还是成年青蛙。
content.en_text: Then, let's turn to their habitats. African Claude frogs are entirely aquatic frogs, so they live in water all their life, whether they are tadpoles or adult frogs.

content.cn_text: 尽管它们可以在各种淡水环境中生存，但它们特别喜欢静水，而不是急流。
content.en_text: Although they can live in a wide range of freshwater environments, they particularly like stillwater, instead of fast-flowing streams.

content.cn_text: 夏季，非洲爪蟾主要生活在温暖的河流中；雨季期间，它们倾向于迁徙到被洪水淹没的森林中。
content.en_text: During the summer, African Claude frogs are mainly found in warm rivers, and during the rainy season, they tend to move into flooded forests.

content.cn_text: 在野外，非洲爪蟾对周围环境的变化具有高度适应性，无论是绿洲还是冰川覆盖的湖泊。
content.en_text: In the wild, African Claude frogs are highly adaptable to changes in the environment around them, whether in oasis or glacier-covered lakes.

content.cn_text: 此外，它们甚至能在高盐度的水中生存。这是因为非洲爪蟾体内有一种独特的生理机制，可以自动调节体内外的水平衡。
content.en_text: Besides, they can even survive in water with high salt levels. It is because African Claude frogs have a unique physiological mechanism in their body that could automatically regulate the balance of water inside and outside their body.

content.cn_text: 在干燥的天气里，非洲爪蟾总是把自己埋入泥土中，在那里它们可以生存一年多。它们生命力极强，寿命长，平均寿命为5到15年。
content.en_text: In dry weather, African Claude frogs always borrow themselves into mud, where they can survive for more than a year. They are incredibly hardy and long-lived, with an average lifespan of 5 to 15 years.

content.cn_text: 有些甚至有20到25年的寿命记录。然而，非洲爪蟾易受水污染的影响，尽管它们并未被列为濒危物种。
content.en_text: Some are even recorded to have lived for 20 to 25 years. However, African Claude frogs are susceptible to the pollution of the water, even though they are not listed as endangered species.

content.cn_text: 现在我们来谈谈非洲爪蟾的食性。它们是食肉动物，喜欢捕食昆虫、蜘蛛、蠕虫、鱼类等。
content.en_text: Now let's talk about the diet of African Claude frogs. They are carnivores that like hunting insects, spiders, worms, fish etc.

content.cn_text: 非洲爪蟾依靠嗅觉来探测猎物。它们首先用后脚上的爪子撕碎大块食物。
content.en_text: African Claude frogs depend on the sense of smell to detect their prey. They first use the claws on their hind feet to tear pieces of ample food.

content.cn_text: 然后，未带蹼的前脚在进食中扮演重要角色。非洲爪蟾用前脚将食物推入嘴中，同时利用一个独特的泵系统将食物吸入口中。
content.en_text: Then the front feet, which are not webbed, play an important role in feeding. African Claude frogs use their front feet to push food into their mouths, and meanwhile a distinctive pump system is used to draw or suck food in their mouths.

content.cn_text: 因此，我们可以看到非洲爪蟾是贪婪的捕食者，并且能迅速适应多种栖息地。因此，在世界某些地区，非洲爪蟾表现为入侵物种，会对淡水生态系统中的其他物种产生负面影响。
content.en_text: So we can see African Claude frogs are voracious predators and can quickly adapt to many habitats. Therefore, in some parts of the world, African Claude frogs act like invasive species, which will negatively affect other species in the fresh water ecosystems.

content.cn_text: 有证据表明，它们通过捕食当地青蛙和其他生物的幼体，对它们的种群造成了破坏。因此，在美国的一些州，如加利福尼亚、华盛顿、亚利桑那等，未经许可拥有、运输或销售非洲爪蟾是非法的。
content.en_text: The evidence shows that they have devastated the populations of native frogs and other creatures by eating their young. As a result, African Claude frogs are illegal to own, transport, or sell without any permit in some states of America, like California, Washington, Arizona etc.

content.cn_text: 在这些地方，非洲爪蟾被视为一种害虫。然而，在加拿大拥有非洲爪蟾是合法的。
content.en_text: Where African Claude frogs have been seen as a type of pest. However, it's legal to own African Claude frogs in Canada.

content.cn_text: 但很多人不知道，非洲爪蟾也用于医药领域。正如我们之前提到的，非洲爪蟾的皮肤覆盖着黏液，这种黏液具有抗生素的特性。
content.en_text: But not many people know that African Claude frogs are also used in medicine. As we mentioned before, the skin of African Claude frogs is covered with mucous, which has properties of antibiotic.

content.cn_text: 这种化学物质可以帮助杀死细菌并治疗感染，并被医学界和大众广泛使用。
content.en_text: This chemical can help kill bacteria and cure the infection, and is widely used by both the medical profession and the general public.

content.cn_text: 所以我们不应该忽视非洲爪蟾的医学价值。
content.en_text: So we shouldn't ignore the medical value of African Claude frogs.

content.cn_text: 第四部分到此结束。你现在有一分钟时间检查第四部分的答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of Part 4. You now have one minute to check your answers to Part 4.

content.cn_text: 第四部分结束。
content.en_text: The end of Part 4.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Question 31-40.

items.title: The mucus on their skin is for 32. ________.
Male frogs are 33. ________ the size of female frogs.
They live in a condition with a high level of 35. ________.
In the condition of drought, they can survive in 36. ________ for a long period of time.
They use the sense of 37. ________ to capture food.
They use their front feet and a unique 38. ________ system when feeding.
People in some states of the USA regard them as 39. ________.
The mucus on their skin has 40. ________ properties.

• Male frogs are $33$ the size of female frogs.

• They prefer $34$ water.
• They live in oases or glacier-covered lakes.
• They live in a condition with a high level of $35$.

Diet:
• They use the sense of $37$ to capture food.
• They use their claws to tear apart ample food.
• They use their front feet and a unique $38$ system when feeding.
Other information:

• The mucus on their skin has $40$ properties.
